case_title: VICTORIA VIDES VS. JOSE R MARTINEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF VIDES, VICTORIA SERVED MAR-24-2019, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIDES, VICTORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JOSE R HERNANDEZ, ROSA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1153 VALENCIA STREET, #2, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
